title: lycopodium selago var. miniatum
intro: Lycopodium selago var. miniatum, also known as Dwarf Club Moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceous family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago var. miniatum include its potential to support the immune system, reduce swelling and pain, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. It can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tincture, or tea, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited research and potential interactions.
